["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["MongoDB 镜像自 MongoDB ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://repo.mongodb.org/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方仓库"}],"，目前有 RHEL/CentOS, Ubuntu, Debian 的镜像，支持 amd64, i386, arm64 架构。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["更详细的内容，可以参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mongodb.org/master/administration/install-on-linux/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方文档"}]]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"debianubuntu-用户","children":"Debian/Ubuntu 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先选择要安装的版本"}],"
",["$r","GlobalMenu",null,{"menus":[{"title":"MongoDB 版本号","items":[["8.0（稳定版）",{"version":"8.0"}],["8.2",{"version":"8.2"}],["7.0",{"version":"7.0"}]]}],"id":"globalMenu-0"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"信任 MongoDB 的 GPG 公钥："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["再选择你的 Debian / Ubuntu 版本，文本框中内容写进 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb.list"}]]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"发行版","items":[["Debian 13",{"release":"trixie","os":"debian","repo":"main"}],["Debian 12",{"release":"bookworm","os":"debian","repo":"main"}],["Debian 11",{"release":"bullseye","os":"debian","repo":"main"}],["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release":"noble","os":"ubuntu","repo":"multiverse"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS",{"release":"jammy","os":"ubuntu","repo":"multiverse"}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["安装 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"mongodb-org"}]," 即可"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"rhelcentos-用户","children":"RHEL/CentOS 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/mongodb.repo"}],"，内容为"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/mongodb.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["刷新缓存并安装 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"mongodb-org"}]," 即可。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
